title: corchorus angolensis
intro: Corchorus angolensis, also known as the African okra or jute mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Corchorus angolensis include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and managing diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
